message:
br-q9x3h: ArenaShard Drop deallocs live slots + drains quarantine

AllocationArena held quarantined entries in VecDeque<QuarantineEntry>
(Copy, address-only) with no Drop impl, so dropping the arena leaked
every outstanding raw_base. In production this runs only at exit, but
in tests and fuzz harnesses it runs per iteration and was the source
of LSan exit-status-77 (fuzz_malloc Alloc(16)+Alloc(0)).

Drop impl:
  1. Iterate slots, dealloc any Valid/Readable/Writable/Unknown slot
     (skip Freed/Invalid/Quarantined — Quarantined is owned by the
     quarantine queue).
  2. Drain quarantine, dealloc each entry.

Verified: fuzz_malloc 60s clean, arena tests 21/21 pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
